001package entityClasses;
002
003import java.util.ArrayList;
004import java.util.List;
005
006import applicationMain.ValidationUtil;
007
008/**
009 * Represents a discussion post and provides class-level CRUD operations for post management.
010 *
011 * <p>This class satisfies TP2 Task 3 by combining:
012 * <ul>
013 *   <li>Post attributes needed by Students User Stories and future staff epics.</li>
014 *   <li>Input validation for safe create/update behavior.</li>
015 *   <li>CRUD operations over an in-memory post repository.</li>
016 * </ul>
017 *
018 * <p><strong>Students User Story coverage:</strong>
019 * <ul>
020 *   <li>Create: students can submit a post with validated fields.</li>
021 *   <li>Read: users can retrieve one post, all posts, or search subsets.</li>
022 *   <li>Update: users can modify title/body/course/resolved status.</li>
023 *   <li>Delete: posts can be removed by id.</li>
024 * </ul>
025 *
026 * <p><strong>TP3 readiness:</strong> Course context, author identity, and resolved status are
027 * included to support future instructional analytics and participation workflows.</p>
028 *
029 * @author TP2 Team
030 * @version 2.00 2026-03-18 Added CRUD and validation operations to Post class
031 */
032public class Post {
033
034        /**
035         * Repository of all posts for CRUD actions in this class.
036         */
037        private static final List<Post> allPosts = new ArrayList<Post>();
038
039        /**
040         * Last computed subset for search/filter operations.
041         */
042        private static List<Post> subsetPosts = new ArrayList<Post>();
043
044        /**
045         * Unique identifier for this post.
046         *
047         * <p>Rationale: stable IDs provide a reliable target for update/delete operations and avoid
048         * ambiguity when titles are similar.
049         */
050        private int postId;
051
052        /**
053         * Short subject line shown in post lists.
054         *
055         * <p>Rationale: students need a concise summary for scanning discussion threads quickly.
056         */
057        private String title;
058
059        /**
060         * Main post content written by the author.
061         *
062         * <p>Rationale: captures the full question/idea needed for discussion and reply workflows.
063         */
064        private String body;
065
066        /**
067         * Course context tag such as CSE360.
068         *
069         * <p>Rationale: enables filtering/grouping when a system supports multiple courses or topics.
070         */
071        private String courseTag;
072
073        /**
074         * Author identifier for ownership, accountability, and role-based actions.
075         *
076         * <p>Rationale: used for displaying who posted and for future permission checks and analytics.
077         */
078        private String authorAsuUserId;
079
080        /**
081         * Indicates whether the post question is considered resolved.
082         *
083         * <p>Rationale: supports student visibility and future instructional-team workflows that track
084         * unresolved questions and participation outcomes.
085         */
086        private boolean resolved;
087
088        /**
089         * Creates a new post with all required domain attributes.
090         *
091         * @param postId unique post identifier
092         * @param title post title shown in summaries
093         * @param body full discussion content
094         * @param courseTag course/topic context tag
095         * @param authorAsuUserId ASU user id of the post author
096         * @param resolved true when post is resolved; false otherwise
097         */
098        public Post(int postId, String title, String body, String courseTag, String authorAsuUserId, boolean resolved) {
099                this.postId = postId;
100                this.title = title;
101                this.body = body;
102                this.courseTag = courseTag;
103                this.authorAsuUserId = authorAsuUserId;
104                this.resolved = resolved;
105        }
106
107        /**
108         * Returns this post's unique identifier.
109         *
110         * @return post id
111         */
112        public int getPostId() {
113                return postId;
114        }
115
116        /**
117         * Updates this post's unique identifier.
118         *
119         * @param postId new post id
120         */
121        public void setPostId(int postId) {
122                this.postId = postId;
123        }
124
125        /**
126         * Returns the current post title.
127         *
128         * @return post title
129         */
130        public String getTitle() {
131                return title;
132        }
133
134        /**
135         * Updates the post title.
136         *
137         * @param title new title value
138         */
139        public void setTitle(String title) {
140                this.title = title;
141        }
142
143        /**
144         * Returns the current post body text.
145         *
146         * @return post body
147         */
148        public String getBody() {
149                return body;
150        }
151
152        /**
153         * Updates the post body text.
154         *
155         * @param body new body value
156         */
157        public void setBody(String body) {
158                this.body = body;
159        }
160
161        /**
162         * Returns the course tag used for this post.
163         *
164         * @return course tag
165         */
166        public String getCourseTag() {
167                return courseTag;
168        }
169
170        /**
171         * Updates the course tag used for this post.
172         *
173         * @param courseTag new course tag value
174         */
175        public void setCourseTag(String courseTag) {
176                this.courseTag = courseTag;
177        }
178
179        /**
180         * Returns the ASU user id of the post author.
181         *
182         * @return author ASU user id
183         */
184        public String getAuthorAsuUserId() {
185                return authorAsuUserId;
186        }
187
188        /**
189         * Updates the ASU user id of the post author.
190         *
191         * @param authorAsuUserId new author id
192         */
193        public void setAuthorAsuUserId(String authorAsuUserId) {
194                this.authorAsuUserId = authorAsuUserId;
195        }
196
197        /**
198         * Indicates whether this post is marked resolved.
199         *
200         * @return true if resolved; false otherwise
201         */
202        public boolean isResolved() {
203                return resolved;
204        }
205
206        /**
207         * Updates the resolved state of this post.
208         *
209         * @param resolved new resolved flag value
210         */
211        public void setResolved(boolean resolved) {
212                this.resolved = resolved;
213        }
214
215        /**
216         * Creates a post after validating all required fields.
217         *
218         * @param post post to create
219         * @return null when successful; otherwise a validation or duplicate-id message
220         */
221        public static String createPost(Post post) {
222                if (post == null) {
223                        return "Post is required.";
224                }
225
226                String error = validatePost(post);
227                if (error != null) {
228                        return error;
229                }
230
231                if (readPostById(post.getPostId()) != null) {
232                        return "Post ID already exists.";
233                }
234
235                // Requirement mapping (Task 3.2): validated create operation
236                allPosts.add(post);
237                return null;
238        }
239
240        /**
241         * Reads a post by its unique id.
242         *
243         * @param postId post id to read
244         * @return matching post or null when not found
245         */
246        public static Post readPostById(int postId) {
247                for (Post post : allPosts) {
248                        if (post.getPostId() == postId) {
249                                return post;
250                        }
251                }
252                return null;
253        }
254
255        /**
256         * Reads all posts as a defensive copy.
257         *
258         * @return copy of all posts
259         */
260        public static List<Post> readAllPosts() {
261                return new ArrayList<Post>(allPosts);
262        }
263
264        /**
265         * Reads the current subset view as a defensive copy.
266         *
267         * @return copy of subset posts
268         */
269        public static List<Post> readSubsetPosts() {
270                return new ArrayList<Post>(subsetPosts);
271        }
272
273        /**
274         * Updates an existing post.
275         *
276         * @param postId id of post to update
277         * @param newTitle new title
278         * @param newBody new body
279         * @param newCourseTag new course tag
280         * @param newResolved new resolved state
281         * @return null when successful; otherwise an error message
282         */
283        public static String updatePost(int postId, String newTitle, String newBody,
284                        String newCourseTag, boolean newResolved) {
285                Post existing = readPostById(postId);
286                if (existing == null) {
287                        return "Post not found for update.";
288                }
289
290                String titleError = ValidationUtil.validatePostTitle(newTitle);
291                if (titleError != null) {
292                        return titleError;
293                }
294
295                String bodyError = ValidationUtil.validatePostBody(newBody);
296                if (bodyError != null) {
297                        return bodyError;
298                }
299
300                String courseTagError = ValidationUtil.validateCourseTag(newCourseTag);
301                if (courseTagError != null) {
302                        return courseTagError;
303                }
304
305                existing.setTitle(newTitle.trim());
306                existing.setBody(newBody.trim());
307                existing.setCourseTag(newCourseTag.trim());
308                existing.setResolved(newResolved);
309                return null;
310        }
311
312        /**
313         * Deletes a post by id.
314         *
315         * @param postId id of post to delete
316         * @return true when removed; false when not found
317         */
318        public static boolean deletePost(int postId) {
319                Post existing = readPostById(postId);
320                if (existing == null) {
321                        return false;
322                }
323
324                allPosts.remove(existing);
325                subsetPosts.remove(existing);
326                return true;
327        }
328
329        /**
330         * Builds a subset using course tag equality (case-insensitive).
331         *
332         * @param courseTag course tag used for filtering
333         */
334        public static void setSubsetFromCourseTag(String courseTag) {
335                subsetPosts = new ArrayList<Post>();
336                for (Post post : allPosts) {
337                        if (post.getCourseTag() != null && post.getCourseTag().equalsIgnoreCase(courseTag)) {
338                                subsetPosts.add(post);
339                        }
340                }
341        }
342
343        /**
344         * Builds a subset from keyword matches in title or body.
345         *
346         * @param keyword keyword text to search
347         */
348        public static void setSubsetFromKeyword(String keyword) {
349                subsetPosts = new ArrayList<Post>();
350                if (keyword == null || keyword.trim().isEmpty()) {
351                        return;
352                }
353
354                String lowerKeyword = keyword.toLowerCase();
355                for (Post post : allPosts) {
356                        String titleText = post.getTitle() == null ? "" : post.getTitle().toLowerCase();
357                        String bodyText = post.getBody() == null ? "" : post.getBody().toLowerCase();
358                        if (titleText.contains(lowerKeyword) || bodyText.contains(lowerKeyword)) {
359                                subsetPosts.add(post);
360                        }
361                }
362        }
363
364        /**
365         * Clears all subset results.
366         */
367        public static void clearSubset() {
368                subsetPosts = new ArrayList<Post>();
369        }
370
371        /**
372         * Utility for tests to reset all stored posts.
373         */
374        public static void clearAllPosts() {
375                allPosts.clear();
376                subsetPosts.clear();
377        }
378
379        /**
380         * Validates a post object before create.
381         *
382         * @param post post to validate
383         * @return null if valid; otherwise error message
384         */
385        private static String validatePost(Post post) {
386                String postIdError = ValidationUtil.validatePostId(post.getPostId());
387                if (postIdError != null) {
388                        return postIdError;
389                }
390
391                String titleError = ValidationUtil.validatePostTitle(post.getTitle());
392                if (titleError != null) {
393                        return titleError;
394                }
395
396                String bodyError = ValidationUtil.validatePostBody(post.getBody());
397                if (bodyError != null) {
398                        return bodyError;
399                }
400
401                String courseTagError = ValidationUtil.validateCourseTag(post.getCourseTag());
402                if (courseTagError != null) {
403                        return courseTagError;
404                }
405
406                String authorError = ValidationUtil.validateAsuUserId(post.getAuthorAsuUserId());
407                if (authorError != null) {
408                        return "Post author: " + authorError;
409                }
410
411                return null;
412        }
413}
